docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT BELLBER, SAM
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOSHBAUGH, AMANDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-22-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOSHBAUGH, AMANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELLBER, SAM $420.20 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.20, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $200, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF $133.95 OF THE JUDGMENT AND AT THE DISCRETION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT NOT LATER THAN MARCH 30, 2016, RETURN THE FOLLOWING ITEMS TO PLAINTIFF: A SHOWER HEAD, A WIRELESS ROUTER, 1/2 BAG POTTING SOIL, BAG OF WORM CASTINGS FERTILIZER, PAIR OF GARDENING SHEARS, BOX OF MIRACLE GROW. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,847.50 FILED BY LOSHBAUGH, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT BELLBER, SAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 SERVED NOV-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BELLBER, SAM
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BELLBER, SAM
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER TO CONTINUE COURT DATE MAIL FOR PLAINTIFF RETURNED: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LOSHBAUGH, AMANDA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
